tasks.prompt: Weekly strategy iteration reminder (weekdays 9am). Check memory for strategy_backtest_results. Continue the strategy research loop: 1) Read existing strategies and identify weaknesses 2) Write new or improved strategies in strategies/ directory 3) Backtest on the Django platform using dashboard/services.py run_backtest() 4) Compare with previous results 5) Update memory/strategy_backtest_results.md with new findings. Focus on A-share momentum strategies.
